creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
My impression of the console issue is that it's more sensible to implement the missing feature in miniupnp (i.e. its ability to set up port forwarding at the console's request) than changing the NAT implementation in pf.

I'm not strictly opposed to adding a new mode, but I'm hesitant to change (default) NAT behaviour that people may (wrongly) rely on to provide some security to their network.
